command.description: A single command to execute localy. Written to a temp file and run via execute_command.

inline.description: An array of commands to execute. Concatenated into a single file and run in one context.

script.description: The path to a local script to execute on the host machine.

scripts.description: An array of local scripts to execute in the order specified.

env.description: Map of key/value pairs to inject into the local environment.

environment_vars.description: List of key=value pairs to inject into the local environment.

env_var_format.description: String template for environment variables (e.g., '%s=%s && ' for Windows).

execute_command.description: The command used to execute the script. Default varies by OS.

inline_shebang.description: The shebang value to use for inline commands. Default is /bin/sh -e.

only_on.description: List of runtime operating systems where this provisioner will execute.

use_linux_pathing.description: For Windows hosts: tells Packer to use WSL-style paths (e.g., /mnt/c/...) for scripts.

valid_exit_codes.description: Exit codes considered successful. Defaults to [0].

max_retries.description: Number of times to retry on failure.

timeout.description: Maximum time allowed for the provisioner to run.

only.description: Only run this provisioner for the listed builder(s) by name.
